seo.meta_title: Acme Platform – Build Faster, Scale Smarter
seo.meta_description: Acme Platform gives engineering and marketing teams the tools to ship content-driven websites at enterprise scale.

hero.headline: Ship content-driven websites at enterprise scale
hero.sub_headline: Acme Platform gives your engineering team APIs they love and your marketing team the editorial freedom they need — without compromising on performance or governance.

feature_grid.heading: Everything you need to deliver at scale
feature_grid.subheading: From content modeling to global delivery, Acme Platform covers the full lifecycle.

features.title: Structured Content Modeling
features.description: Define content types, relationships, and modular blocks that reflect your real domain — not a flat page builder.

features.title: Global CDN Delivery
features.description: Sub-100ms response times worldwide via a multi-region CDN with automatic cache invalidation on publish.

features.title: Workflow & Governance
features.description: Role-based access, multi-stage approval workflows, and scheduled publishing for enterprise compliance.

features.title: Multi-Locale Support
features.description: Manage translations with locale-level fallback, side-by-side comparison, and locale-specific publishing.

cta_banner.heading: Ready to modernize your content stack?
cta_banner.body_text: Join 500+ companies that ship faster with Acme Platform. No credit card required.
